name: golang-github-gofrs-uuid-dev
title: golang-github-gofrs-uuid-dev
description:
UUID library for Golang
This library provides a pure Golang implementation of Universally Unique
Identifiers (UUID) variant as defined in RFC-9562. This package supports
both the creation and parsing of UUIDs in different formats.
.
The library supports the following UUID versions:
* Version 1, based on timestamp and MAC address
* Version 3, based on MD5 hashing of a named value
* Version 4, based on random numbers
* Version 5, based on SHA-1 hashing of a named value
* Version 6, a k-sortable id based on timestamp, and field-compatible with v1
* Version 7, a k-sortable id based on timestamp
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-gofrs-uuid-dev because UUID library for Golang.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-gofrs-uuid-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-gofrs-uuid-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-gofrs-uuid-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
